{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Defeat the Army
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The characters are presented with a golden flame instruction to '[[Defeat the Army]]'.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|In the air before Lindon, characters appeared in golden flame: “Defeat the Army.”<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
